title: Verify Hub Initialization
description: Validate that Hub Initialization works as described: agenthive init creates hub at ~/.agenthive/
expected_result: Hub Initialization functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Project Registration
description: Validate that Project Registration works as described: Register projects with agenthive project add
expected_result: Project Registration functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Task Management
description: Validate that Task Management works as described: Create, assign, list, update tasks via CLI and files
expected_result: Task Management functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Agent Communication
description: Validate that Agent Communication works as described: Structured channels for agent-to-agent messaging
expected_result: Agent Communication functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Atomic Locking
description: Validate that Atomic Locking works as described: O_CREAT|O_EXCL + rename prevents concurrent modification
expected_result: Atomic Locking functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Agent Profiles
description: Validate that Agent Profiles works as described: Register agents with capabilities and tool access
expected_result: Agent Profiles functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Convention Injection
description: Validate that Convention Injection works as described: Define coding standards once, inject into all tools
expected_result: Convention Injection functions correctly as specified

title: Verify GitHub Sync
description: Validate that GitHub Sync works as described: Bidirectional sync between hive tasks and GitHub issues
expected_result: GitHub Sync functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Dashboard
description: Validate that Dashboard works as described: Interactive terminal dashboard with 8 tabs

title: Verify REST API
description: Validate that REST API works as described: 13 REST API endpoints for programmatic access
expected_result: REST API functions correctly as specified

title: AI Agent -- primary workflow
description: End-to-end scenario for AI Agent
scenario_steps: As AI Agent, navigate to the application
Interact with Hub Initialization
Interact with Project Registration
Interact with Task Management
Verify final state matches expectations
expected_outcome: All interactions complete successfully

title: Developer -- primary workflow
description: End-to-end scenario for Developer
scenario_steps: As Developer, navigate to the application
Interact with Hub Initialization
Interact with Project Registration
Interact with Task Management
Verify final state matches expectations
expected_outcome: All interactions complete successfully

title: View Hub Initialization list
description: CRUD flow validation for Hub Initialization
scenario_steps: Navigate to Hub Initialization section
Verify list/table is displayed with items
Verify each item shows key information (ID, name, status)
Verify empty state message when no items exist
expected_outcome: List displays all items with sufficient information to identify each one

title: View Hub Initialization detail
description: CRUD flow validation for Hub Initialization
scenario_steps: Navigate to Hub Initialization list
Click on a specific item
Verify detail view shows ALL fields (not just summary)
Verify user can see full description, attributes, metadata
Verify back/close navigation to return to list
expected_outcome: Detail view shows complete information about the selected item

title: Edit Hub Initialization item
description: CRUD flow validation for Hub Initialization
scenario_steps: Navigate to Hub Initialization detail view
Click edit button or inline edit field
Modify one or more fields
Save changes
Verify updated data is reflected in list and detail views
expected_outcome: User can modify item data and changes persist

title: Delete Hub Initialization item
description: CRUD flow validation for Hub Initialization
scenario_steps: Navigate to Hub Initialization list or detail view
Click delete button
Confirm deletion in dialog
Verify item is removed from list
Verify proper feedback (toast or message)
expected_outcome: Item is deleted with confirmation step and user feedback
